name: Aruba Racquet Club
description: Aruba Racquet Club is a place to play pickleball in United States, NJ. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Bayonne High School
description: Come play pickleball at Bayonne High School in Bayonne, NJ! There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to lights. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Braddock Park Pickleball Courts
description:
All courts are outdoor and are split into two groups - one group of 4 and one group of 3. All courts are properly lined + surfaced & all have permanent nets + netting between courts.
There is ample street parking around Braddock Park and near the courts.

The group of 3 courts is located a short walk away from the tennis courts (marked in yellow).
These courts are open play all the time with paddle racks and benches but no lights.
open_play_schedule: Sat-Sun are reservations required from 8AM-9PM. Reservations are made by calling (201) 978-1765 - present photo ID when you check in.

name: Buchmuller Park Pickleball Court
description: Buchmuller Park Pickleball Court is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Secaucus, NJ. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Dorbrook Recreation Area
description: Dorbrook Recreation Area is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in United States, NJ. There are 5 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Garabrant Pickle
description: Come play pickleball at Garabrant Pickle in Jersey City, NJ! There is 1 indoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court cannot be reserved. The court is private.

name: Hoboken Multipurpose Center
description: Come play pickleball at Hoboken Multipurpose Center in Hoboken, NJ! There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Hoboken Pickleball Court
description: Hoboken Pickleball Court is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hoboken, NJ. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Hudson County - Washington Park
description: Hudson County - Washington Park is a place to play pickleball in Union City, NJ. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Kotofit
description: Come play pickleball at Kotofit in Jersey City, NJ! There are 2 indoor hard and concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, water, food, and trainers or lessons.

name: Kotofit Brunswick
description: Kotofit Brunswick is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Jersey City, NJ. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Lauren Hill Park
description: Lauren Hill Park is a place to play pickleball in Secaucus, NJ. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Manalapan Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Manalapan Recreation Center in United States, NJ! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, and water. The courts are free.

name: Stephen R Gregg Park
description: Enter Park through 48th Street and drive down towards the fields. The courts will be on your left at the bottom of the hill

name: Tamaques Reservation
description: Tamaques Reservation is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in United States, NJ. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. You can reserve the courts. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.
